title: scTDA Cancer Plasticity: a persistent-homology framework for cyclic cell-state plasticity in EGFR-mutant lung cancer
description: An open-source pipeline combining persistent homology (H_0, H_1) and the Mapper algorithm with permutation-based null-model testing, cell-cycle ablation, Wasserstein diagram comparison, and Mapper-based gene attribution for longitudinal scRNA-seq analysis. Validated on five EGFR-mutant NSCLC datasets across cell line, PDX, and patient tumor scales.

creators.name: Lin, Hsieh-Ting
creators.affiliation: Department of Medical Oncology, Koo Foundation Sun Yat-Sen Cancer Center, Taipei, Taiwan
